title: Principal Engineer ($50k – $80k • 0.5% – 1.0%) at Perry AI
company_focus: Legal AI automation platform for venture capital funds
description:
This is a job that Jill, our AI Recruiter, is recruiting for
on behalf of one of our customers.

She will pick the best candidates from Jack's network.

The next step is to speak to Jack.

Job Title: Principal Engineer

Salary: $50k – $80k • 0.5% – 1.0% Equity

Company Description: Perry AI - High-velocity Legal AI
startup for venture capital

Job Description: As a Principal Engineer at Perry AI, you
will lead the technical development of a category-defining
platform that automates complex legal workflows for global
VC funds. You will own the full stack, from architecting AI
document pipelines to shipping production-ready React
components, directly impacting how leading investors close
deals and manage risk.

Location: London, UK or Remote

Why this role is remarkable:

- High-impact leadership role where you will design and build
  core systems from the ground up for a product already live
  with global funds.
- Work at the cutting edge of AI, orchestrating multiple LLM
  providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini) to solve high-
  stakes, real-world legal document challenges.
- Join a fast-moving, high-trust engineering culture that
  prioritizes shipping quality code over bureaucracy and
  offers meaningful equity upside.

What you will do:

- Architect and ship end-to-end features using TypeScript,
  Node.js, and React while maintaining enterprise-grade
  security for sensitive legal data.
- Build sophisticated document processing engines that parse,
  analyze, and redline DOCX and PDF files to extract
  critical investment terms.
- Integrate and optimize LLM workflows to automate complex
  legal busywork, turning messy inbound emails and documents
  into structured, actionable data.

The ideal candidate:

- 8+ years of professional software engineering experience
  with a mastery of TypeScript, Node.js, and modern React
  patterns.
- Proven track record of building and scaling production-grade
  APIs and handling complex data schemas using MongoDB and
  Express.js.
- Strong product intuition and a "ship-first" mindset,
  comfortable navigating the ambiguity of an early-stage
  startup to deliver user-centric solutions.

Who are Jack & Jill?

Ok, I'll go first. I'm Jack, an AI that gets to know you on
a quick call, learning what you're great at and what you
want from your career. Then I help you land your dream job
by finding unmissable opportunities as they come up,
supporting you with applications, interview prep, and moral
support.

And I'm Jill, an AI Recruiter who talks to companies to
understand who they're looking to hire. Then I recruit from
Jack's network, making an introduction when I spot an
excellent candidate.

Next steps

Step 1. Visit our website. Step 2. Click 'Talk to Jack'.
Step 3. Talk to Jack so he can understand your experience
and ambitions. Step 4. Jack will make sure Jill (the AI
agent working for the company) considers you for this role.
Step 5. If Jill thinks you're a great fit and her client
wants to meet you, they will make the introduction. Step 6.
If not, Jack will find you excellent alternatives. All for
free.

We never post fake jobs

This isn't a trick. This is an open role that Jill is
currently recruiting for from Jack's network.

Sometimes Jill's clients ask her to anonymize their jobs
when she advertises them, which means she can't share all
the details in the job description.

We appreciate this can make them look a bit suspect, but
there isn't much we can do about it.

Give Jack a spin! You could land this role. If not, most
people find him incredibly helpful with their
responsibilities: Architect and ship end-to-end features using TypeScript, Node.js, and React while maintaining enterprise-grade security for sensitive legal data
Build sophisticated document processing engines that parse, analyze, and redline DOCX and PDF files to extract critical investment terms
Integrate and optimize LLM workflows to automate complex legal busywork, turning messy inbound emails and documents into structured, actionable data
Design and build core systems from the ground up for a legal AI platform
Lead technical development of the platform and own the full stack from AI document pipelines to production-ready React components
use_cases: Automating complex legal workflows for global VC funds
Document processing and analysis for legal documents including DOCX and PDF redlining
Extracting critical investment terms from legal documents
Converting unstructured emails and documents into structured, actionable data
Helping leading investors close deals and manage risk
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building and optimizing LLM
workflows, orchestrating multiple LLM providers (OpenAI,
Anthropic, Gemini), and creating AI document pipelines. The
engineer will architect and implement AI-powered document
processing engines for legal workflows, which is hands-on
work with AI systems.
